title: Random Drop
description: This is a plugin that gives the players a random weapon or armor drop, meant for tournament purposes.
body:
Drops is a modular loot drop plugin for Minecraft 1.21+, designed to deliver randomized gear, tools, and consumables to players every 30 seconds. Items are selected from a weighted pool, making rare drops like Netherite gear or Enchanted Golden Apples feel truly mythic. Each drop cycle is announced globally, adding a cinematic layer to your server’s atmosphere.
Perfect for survival servers, tournaments, or lore-driven worlds, Drops requires no setup—just install and go. It’s built with Maven and the Spigot API, making it easy to expand with custom effects, lore overlays, or config support.
Commands:
- /startdrops — Begins the drop cycle
- /stopdrops — Ends the drop cycle
Current loot includes:
- Weapons: Wooden to Netherite swords
- Tools: Stone to Netherite axes
- Armor: Full sets from Leather to Netherite
- Consumables: Golden Apples and Enchanted Golden Apples
Drops is lightweight, mythic-friendly, and ready to be customized. Whether you want to escalate chaos or reward exploration, this plugin adds a dynamic rhythm to your world.
